name: download_file
description: Download the content of a file from OneDrive. You can reference the file by its unique item ID or by its path. The response is a 302 redirect to a pre-authenticated download URL.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the file to download. Alternatively, use path-based addressing: /v1.0/me/drive/root:/path/to/file:/content.

body._note: The response is a 302 redirect. The Location header contains a pre-authenticated URL to download the file content directly.
